dynamic_list_policy.reason: Game and server rows are dynamic by account, game, build, availability and backend state. TASK-023 inventories data categories, visible field model, focus/scroll behavior and sampled segments; it does not publish or require a static complete row dump.
dynamic_list_policy.test_design_rule: Autotests should assert stable categories, boundaries, accessibility/focus behavior, redaction and invariants. They must not depend on a fixed game list, fixed server count, fixed server aliases, fixed prices or fixed hardware rows.

task023_fresh_runtime_checkpoints.summary: Initial foreground was an external Google TV/quick-settings surface, not an app screen.
Phone input, numeric keyboard, legal links and transient TV picture-mode overlay were visible; raw values stayed local-only.
Helper-backed synthetic auth/session recovery returned through onboarding into the post-auth catalog.
Rail-focused D-pad down no-op and mid-grid card category samples were captured.
Long game grid reached a repeated bottom/no-change condition for this run. This proves list-boundary behavior, not a static title inventory.
Search popular/no-results state required visual keyboard taps for query entry; Back and rail tap attempts did not recover.
Approved force-stop plus explicit relaunch recovered from the Search trap back to catalog.
Session Journal, Steam top-up and rail D-pad probes repeated the catalog instead of opening those routes in this fresh state.
Direct card tap first focused the grid card; confirm then opened game detail.
Forty server-list segments captured field categories and dynamic variability. Exhaustive server row enumeration was intentionally not collected.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020 baseline plus TASK-023 relaunch recovery
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Loader checkpoints require wait and recapture before route verdict.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: Do not publish private launch components.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Loaders can mask delayed route transitions.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Wait for post-loader state before asserting screen identity.

inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Recover app foreground before continuing app inventory.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Classify as external/system evidence, not app data.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: Do not report as app crash, blank screen or app completion.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Idle/wake or launcher focus can interrupt runtime inventory.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Autotests need foreground/app-package preconditions before screen assertions.

inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Visual keyboard and gamepad hints can be more reliable than XML focus alone.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Credential-like data is represented only as field categories.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: Synthetic auth only through approved local helper path.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: ADB text input can be unreliable for masked phone fields.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Auth tests should use the proven visual-keyboard/helper path and redact screenshots.

inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Long legal WebView sampled; full legal text is not republished.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Prior evidence includes Back/recovery attempts and WebView accessibility gaps.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Document categories only; no verbatim legal dump in this inventory.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No external browser or endpoint extraction.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Legal content can vary by build/config.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Validate presence, scrollability and recovery rather than full text equality.

inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Wrong-code feedback can be visible in screenshots while absent from XML.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: Captcha must not be solved or bypassed.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: External auth service may escalate to captcha earlier than the nominal retry count.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Capture every OTP/captcha checkpoint visually and stop at captcha.

inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Confirm/Button A advances onboarding CTA in baseline evidence.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Slide categories and CTA states only.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No account mutation beyond approved onboarding completion.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Onboarding recurrence depends on profile/session state.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Record recurrence cause and completion state per run.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020/TASK-022 baseline plus TASK-023 anomaly probes
inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Expanded/collapsed and route recurrence states sampled.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Fresh TASK-023 found route no-ops from a catalog rail state; baseline reached routes from other states.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Rail labels/categories are public-safe; account card values are local-only.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No logout/account mutation from rail/settings without fixture.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Rail action result depends on focus origin and app state.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Autotests need a focus oracle before route activation.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020/TASK-022 baseline plus TASK-023 checkpoints 006 and 055-057
inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Top segment sampled; banner QR is a boundary surface.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Visual focus and route result may diverge from intended tap/confirm path.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Public docs include only categories and local decode refs, never QR targets or account-like values.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: QR decoded local-only when needed and never opened.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Catalog top content and continue row are dynamic.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Use category-level assertions and QR boundary checks.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020/TASK-022 baseline plus TASK-023 long scroll bottom hash control
inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Top, mid, deep and bottom/no-change segments sampled. Complete title/value enumeration is intentionally not collected.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: D-pad and direct tap can move from rail into grid; direct tap first focused a card before confirm opened detail.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Game list values remain local-only; public report records categories, segment behavior and dynamic-list warning.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No stream/session start from catalog cards without fixture.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Game list length and content can change; bottom is only a run-specific list boundary.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Tests should not assert fixed game names/counts; validate card schema, focus, scroll and redaction.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020 baseline plus TASK-023 no-results/recovery trap
inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Empty, no-results and result-card categories sampled. Raw query and result values stay local-only.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: ADB text input did not visibly affect query until visible keyboard keys were tapped; Back did not recover in fresh no-results state.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Public summary uses query/result categories only.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No endpoint extraction or external traversal.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Search input path and recovery behavior are focus-sensitive.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Search tests need visible-keyboard input and recovery assertions.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020/TASK-022 baseline; fresh TASK-023 route blocked by tooling/focus anomaly
inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Baseline empty state persisted after delays; no real session was created to populate rows.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Fresh TASK-023 attempts to open Journal from catalog did not route; baseline route remains confirmed from a clean state.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No paid session is created only to populate journal.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Continue Game row does not imply a visible journal row.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Session-history tests require an approved session fixture.

inventory_rows.screen_family: catalog_banner_qr steam_topup_qr feedback_qr how_to_steam_instruction_qr virtual_gamepad_qr payment_checkout_or_payment_qr
inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020/TASK-022 local-only jsqr decode artifacts plus TASK-023 recurring QR screenshots
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: QR requires screenshot inspection; raw target decode is local-only and targets are not opened.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Only QR category, scheme category and local redacted refs are public.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: Decode with established jsqr path when new or materially changed; never open/follow targets in TASK-023.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Recurring QR should reuse prior local decode unless visual evidence changes.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: QR decode tooling is available; missing ad hoc decoder libraries are not a product blocker.

inventory_rows.screen_family: settings_root settings_promo_codes settings_gamepad_setup settings_gamepad_reset_or_detection logout_confirmation_and_relogin gamepad_hint_sleep_visibility
inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Settings cards and gamepad mapping rows sampled; reset/remap/pairing not executed.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Active gamepad screen required Close for safe recovery; Back/B no-op was recorded.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Settings categories are public; app/controller/account values remain local-only if user-like.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No reset, remap, pairing, logout confirmation or account mutation.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Gamepad hints can disappear when physical controller sleeps.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Settings tests must guard mutating controls and confirm controller active/sleep state.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020/TASK-022 baseline plus TASK-023 detail entry
inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Detail header and server area sampled.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Direct tap first focused card; confirm opened detail in TASK-023.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Game metadata values are local-only; public report records data categories.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No account connection or external Steam action.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Detail content is remote/catalog-bound and can change.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Assert metadata zones and boundaries, not exact title/description text.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020/TASK-022 baseline plus TASK-023 40-segment server sampling
inventory_rows.list_or_grid_sampling: Forty fresh segments sampled; owner clarified rows can vary by game and may exceed 250. Complete server row/value enumeration is intentionally not collected.
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: D-pad down scrolls server cards while retaining left rail visibility; selection of concrete server can lead to payment/session boundary under gamepad fixture.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Server/tariff values remain local-only; public report records field model and dynamic-list policy.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No full row scrape, no payment, no stream/session start.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Server count/content changes by game and availability; values are poor stable test oracles.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Autotests should validate card schema, dynamic pagination/scroll, redaction and boundary behavior instead of fixed rows.

inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Physical gamepad fixture changed downstream result from connect-device gate to payment QR boundary in TASK-022.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No payment, checkout completion, stream/session start or external navigation.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Fixture state affects whether server selection reaches device gate or payment QR.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Payment/session tests require separate staging/non-real-payment fixture and stricter recovery.

inventory_rows.evidence_basis: TASK-020/TASK-022 baseline plus TASK-023 route no-op probes
inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Fresh TASK-023 Steam rail tap/confirm no-oped from catalog; TASK-022 non-A button sampling reached protected Steam-account boundary.
inventory_rows.public_safe_data_policy: Account/purchase targets and account-like labels stay local-only.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No Steam connection, purchase, external traversal or profile/account mutation.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: Non-primary buttons can activate account-bearing boundaries and are not harmless by default.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Button sampling must be guarded by exact focus and boundary recovery.

inventory_rows.focus_action_metadata: Focused refresh recovered after reversible DNS offline-like condition.
inventory_rows.boundary_policy: No packet capture, proxying or private endpoint extraction.
inventory_rows.risk_or_hypothesis: True Wi-Fi-off verdict remains separate from DNS offline-like evidence.
inventory_rows.test_design_implication: Offline tests need reversible network policy and foreground recovery oracle.

closure_ledger.reason: Dynamic list values are not collected as a complete public inventory.
Field model and dynamic sampling covered; complete row enumeration not collected.
Server count/content can vary by game and exceed 250 rows.

anomalies.expected_result: Move focus/scroll into next reachable catalog or rail item.
anomalies.observed_result: Top catalog segment repeated across checkpoints.
anomalies.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: hypothesis: focus remained anchored on rail or route state blocked vertical traversal.
anomalies.test_design_implication: Future tests need explicit visual focus oracle before long-list scrolling.

anomalies.expected_result: Query field updates and result/no-result state changes.
anomalies.observed_result: No visible field update until on-screen keyboard keys were tapped.
anomalies.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely: app keyboard focus/input method does not consume raw ADB text in this state.
anomalies.test_design_implication: Use visible keyboard interaction for Search input tests.

anomalies.trigger_action: Back and rail/tap attempts from Search no-results keyboard state
anomalies.expected_result: Recover to catalog or selected rail route.
anomalies.observed_result: Search state persisted until force-stop/relaunch recovery.
anomalies.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: hypothesis: keyboard/no-results state captures Back and route taps.
anomalies.test_design_implication: Search recovery needs dedicated regression coverage and safe relaunch fallback.

anomalies.trigger_action: D-pad/tap/icon attempts to open Session Journal from fresh catalog state
anomalies.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: hypothesis: focus origin or touch/focus mismatch prevented rail route activation.
anomalies.test_design_implication: Route tests must reset to known focus state and verify route result visually.

anomalies.trigger_action: Tap and confirm on Steam top-up rail item
anomalies.observed_result: Catalog remained visible; no Bad request observed in this probe.
anomalies.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: hypothesis: rail route activation blocked by focus/state mismatch.
anomalies.test_design_implication: Steam route tests need route-state precondition; if Bad request appears, retry and record instability.

anomalies.trigger_action: Direct tap on first visible game card followed by confirm
anomalies.observed_result: Tap first focused the card; confirm opened detail.
anomalies.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely: TV grid uses two-step focus/activate behavior.
anomalies.test_design_implication: Card-opening tests should allow focus-then-activate sequence.

anomalies.trigger_action: Repeated DPAD_DOWN through game detail server list
anomalies.expected_result: Stable long list or bottom eventually reached.
anomalies.observed_result: Forty segments still showed changing server cards; owner clarified counts can vary by game and exceed 250.
anomalies.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely: server availability and count are game/backend dependent.
anomalies.test_design_implication: Do not assert exact server rows; assert schema, dynamic scroll, boundary and redaction.

anomalies.trigger_action: UIAutomator XML checks on rich catalog/detail surfaces
anomalies.expected_result: XML exposes enough labels/focus to classify data.
anomalies.observed_result: Visual screenshot carried important QR/banner/focus/content evidence; XML alone was insufficient for several states.
anomalies.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely: hybrid/TV rendering exposes partial accessibility tree.
anomalies.test_design_implication: Runtime inventory must always inspect screenshots/video in addition to XML.

closure_result.fresh_runtime_checkpoint_files_observed: 001-062 with sampled subsegments; local-only evidence contains raw screenshots/XML

risks_unknowns: Game catalog content and server-card content are dynamic. TASK-023 covers data categories and sampled behavior, not complete value lists.
Payment, external QR traversal and paid stream/session start remain boundary-blocked.
Raw server, tariff, payment, QR, title, account-like and credential values remain local-only.
Fresh TASK-023 rail routing hit route no-ops for Journal and Steam from one catalog state; baseline still covers those families from clean states.
Some local evidence files from interrupted scroll batches are incomplete and are not used as proof.
